verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United Kingdom. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence (weatherboarding, privet hedges, narrow roads) that strongly supported the correct answer. The tournament logic was sound, correctly prioritizing the UK over the closest analog (Ireland) based on specific architectural cues.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of lush greenery and narrow roads match image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Privet hedges and deciduous trees are clearly visible.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road width and lack of curbs are accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: White weatherboarding and slate roofs are correctly identified.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted the United Kingdom.
